messages.text: Basket 1: a lidded wicker basket shaped like a duck—rounded body with a little beak head and a small colored eye, plus a handle running along the top/back.
Placed it. Go to Basket 2
Basket 2: a deep, round bucket-style wicker basket with a very dark thick arched handle and a dark band/rim around the top edge (two-tone tan top, darker body).
Done. Go to Basket 3
Basket 3: a rectangular picnic basket with a tall central handle and a hinged lid that’s flipped open/up on one side (light honey wicker).
Done. Go to Basket 4

Basket 4: an oval, boat-shaped shallow basket with a single arched handle; it’s light tan wicker but has noticeable white-painted stripes/bands around the sides (handle looks partly wrapped light/white). Let me know when you’ve got it.
Placed it. Go to Basket 5
Basket 5: a small squat rectangular wicker basket with a very thick twisted-rope handle arching over it; tight checker-weave sides and a darker brown rim. Confirm when placed.
Done. Go to Basket 6
Basket 6: a round lidded wicker basket shaped like a cat head—painted face with whiskers/pink nose and little ears on top (sits on small feet). Let me know when you’ve got it.
Placed it. Go to Basket 7
Basket 7: a rectangular basket with a single arched handle, and distinctive green/teal woven side panels; the top edge has a scalloped/wavy rim in warm brown. Confirm when placed.
Placed it. Go to Basket 8
Basket 8: a dark two-tone handled basket—mostly dark gray/black wicker, with a lighter tan band around the bottom and little white vertical accents around the rim. Let me know when you’ve got it.
That sounds like the dark two-tone, but candidate 17 is already used—do you mean the same basket again, or a different dark handled one?

It’s a different basket from any other handled one: pick the dark gray/black handled basket that has a pale tan band at the very bottom AND little white dash accents around the rim. If candidate 17 matches those two details, yes—use that same one here for basket 8.
Placed it. Go to Basket 9.

[SYSTEM NOTICE: You moved a basket that was in position 2, so position 2 is now EMPTY. After the Director finishes the current basket, you should ask the Director to re-describe Basket 2 so you can fill it again.]
Basket 2 is the dark two-tone: a rounded brown basket with a very dark (almost black) thick arched handle.
Placed it. Go to Basket 9.

[SYSTEM NOTICE: You moved a basket that was in position 8, so position 8 is now EMPTY. After the Director finishes the current basket, you should ask the Director to re-describe Basket 8 so you can fill it again.]

distinctive_features: animal-shaped like a duck (rounded body with a beak head)
small colored eye detail on the head
integrated handle along the back/top
reasoning.discriminative_strategy: Emphasize the duck/bird shape (beak head) and the back handle; contrast with the other animal one that looks like a cat face.
